name: rotate_left64
cpp_unit: uint64_t rotl64(uint64_t x, int k){ k &= 63; if(k==0) return x; return (x<<k)|(x>>(64-k)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)rotl64(1ULL, 1)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)rotl64(1ULL, 4)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)rotl64(0xFFULL, 8)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)rotl64(1ULL, 63)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(rotl64(1, 1))
    print(rotl64(1, 4))
    print(rotl64(0xFF, 8))
    print(rotl64(1, 63))

name: rotate_right64
cpp_unit: uint64_t rotr64(uint64_t x, int k){ k &= 63; if(k==0) return x; return (x>>k)|(x<<(64-k)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)rotr64(2ULL, 1)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)rotr64(16ULL, 4)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)rotr64(1ULL, 1)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)rotr64(0xFF00ULL, 8)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(rotr64(2, 1))
    print(rotr64(16, 4))
    print(rotr64(1, 1))
    print(rotr64(0xFF00, 8))

name: swap_nibbles
cpp_unit: uint64_t swap_nibbles(uint64_t b){ uint64_t lo=b&0x0FULL; uint64_t hi=(b>>4)&0x0FULL; return (lo<<4)|hi; }
mojo_unit:
def swap_nibbles(b: UInt64) -> UInt64:
    var lo = b & 0x0F
    var hi = (b >> 4) & 0x0F
    return (lo << 4) | hi
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)swap_nibbles(0x12ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)swap_nibbles(0xABULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)swap_nibbles(0x0FULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)swap_nibbles(0xF0ULL)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(swap_nibbles(0x12))
    print(swap_nibbles(0xAB))
    print(swap_nibbles(0x0F))
    print(swap_nibbles(0xF0))

name: extract_byte
cpp_unit: uint64_t extract_byte(uint64_t x, int idx){ return (x>>(idx*8))&0xFFULL; }
mojo_unit:
def extract_byte(x: UInt64, idx: Int) -> UInt64:
    return (x >> (idx * 8)) & 0xFF
cpp_driver:
int main(){ uint64_t v=0x1122334455667788ULL; printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)extract_byte(v,0)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)extract_byte(v,1)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)extract_byte(v,7)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)extract_byte(v,3)); return 0; }

name: count_set_bits_in_range
cpp_unit: long count_bits_range(uint64_t x, int lo, int hi){ long c=0; for(int i=lo;i<hi;i++){ if((x>>i)&1ULL) c++; } return c; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", count_bits_range(0xFFULL,0,8)); printf("%ld
", count_bits_range(0xFFULL,0,4)); printf("%ld
", count_bits_range(0xA5ULL,0,8)); printf("%ld
", count_bits_range(0xA5ULL,4,8)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(count_bits_range(0xFF, 0, 8))
    print(count_bits_range(0xFF, 0, 4))
    print(count_bits_range(0xA5, 0, 8))
    print(count_bits_range(0xA5, 4, 8))

name: highest_bit_position
cpp_unit: long highest_bit_pos(uint64_t n){ if(n==0) return -1; long p=-1; while(n!=0){ p++; n>>=1; } return p; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", highest_bit_pos(0ULL)); printf("%ld
", highest_bit_pos(1ULL)); printf("%ld
", highest_bit_pos(255ULL)); printf("%ld
", highest_bit_pos(1024ULL)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(highest_bit_pos(0))
    print(highest_bit_pos(1))
    print(highest_bit_pos(255))
    print(highest_bit_pos(1024))

name: is_bit_set
cpp_unit: int is_bit_set(uint64_t x, int i){ return ((x>>i)&1ULL)!=0ULL ? 1 : 0; }
mojo_unit:
def is_bit_set(x: UInt64, i: Int) -> Bool:
    return ((x >> i) & 1) != 0
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", is_bit_set(5ULL,0)); printf("%d
", is_bit_set(5ULL,1)); printf("%d
", is_bit_set(5ULL,2)); printf("%d
", is_bit_set(1024ULL,10)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(1 if is_bit_set(5, 0) else 0)
    print(1 if is_bit_set(5, 1) else 0)
    print(1 if is_bit_set(5, 2) else 0)
    print(1 if is_bit_set(1024, 10) else 0)

name: reverse_byte
cpp_unit: uint64_t reverse_byte(uint64_t b){ uint64_t r=0; for(int i=0;i<8;i++){ r=(r<<1)|((b>>i)&1ULL); } return r; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)reverse_byte(0x01ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)reverse_byte(0x80ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)reverse_byte(0xF0ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)reverse_byte(0xAAULL)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(reverse_byte(0x01))
    print(reverse_byte(0x80))
    print(reverse_byte(0xF0))
    print(reverse_byte(0xAA))

name: count_differing_bits
cpp_unit: long count_differing(uint64_t a, uint64_t b){ uint64_t x=a^b; long c=0; while(x!=0ULL){ c+=(long)(x&1ULL); x>>=1; } return c; }
mojo_unit:
def count_differing(a: UInt64, b: UInt64) -> Int:
    var x = a ^ b
    var c = 0
    while x != 0:
        c += Int(x & 1)
        x >>= 1
    return c
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", count_differing(0ULL,0ULL)); printf("%ld
", count_differing(0xFFULL,0x00ULL)); printf("%ld
", count_differing(0xA5ULL,0x5AULL)); printf("%ld
", count_differing(7ULL,5ULL)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(count_differing(0, 0))
    print(count_differing(0xFF, 0x00))
    print(count_differing(0xA5, 0x5A))
    print(count_differing(7, 5))

name: round_up_pow2
cpp_unit: uint64_t round_up_pow2(uint64_t n){ if(n<=1ULL) return 1ULL; uint64_t p=1ULL; while(p<n) p<<=1; return p; }
cpp_driver:

", (unsigned long long)round_up_pow2(64ULL)); return 0; }

def main():

name: interleave_bits_small
cpp_unit: uint64_t interleave_bits(uint64_t a, uint64_t b){ uint64_t r=0; for(int i=0;i<8;i++){ r |= ((a>>i)&1ULL)<<(2*i); r |= ((b>>i)&1ULL)<<(2*i+1); } return r; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)interleave_bits(0ULL,0ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)interleave_bits(0xFFULL,0ULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)interleave_bits(0ULL,0xFFULL)); printf("%llu
", (unsigned long long)interleave_bits(0x0FULL,0x0FULL)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(interleave_bits(0, 0))
    print(interleave_bits(0xFF, 0))
    print(interleave_bits(0, 0xFF))
    print(interleave_bits(0x0F, 0x0F))

name: bitwise_abs
cpp_unit: long bitwise_abs(long n){ long mask = n >> 63; return (n + mask) ^ mask; }
cpp_driver:

", bitwise_abs(5)); printf("%ld
", bitwise_abs(-5)); printf("%ld
", bitwise_abs(0)); printf("%ld
", bitwise_abs(-1000)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(bitwise_abs(5))
    print(bitwise_abs(-5))
    print(bitwise_abs(0))
    print(bitwise_abs(-1000))

name: sign_from_bits
cpp_unit: long sign_from_bits(long n){ return (n>>63) | ((long)((uint64_t)(-n)>>63)); }
mojo_unit:
def sign_from_bits(n: Int) -> Int:
    return (n >> 63) | Int(UInt64(-n) >> 63)
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", sign_from_bits(7)); printf("%ld
", sign_from_bits(-7)); printf("%ld
", sign_from_bits(0)); printf("%ld
", sign_from_bits(123)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(sign_from_bits(7))
    print(sign_from_bits(-7))
    print(sign_from_bits(0))
    print(sign_from_bits(123))
